creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 200587
Fix the way PACKAGE_VERSION is set

The user interface of mtr(1) shows the title "My traceroute  [vUNKNOWN]".

The autotools script attempt to find the version from the git sources, but since we are *not* in a git repository, it returns "UNKNOWN" which is used as the version number in various places.

The attached patch replaces the call to the tools in charge of getting the version number with the value of ${PORTVERSION}, fixing the issue.
